title: Skill Record
description: Record of a skill ingested into the system, with metadata and trust tier assignment

description.description: Detailed description of what the skill does

source.description: Source location or origin of the skill (e.g., file path, repository URL)

trustTier.description: Trust tier classification for the skill (0=Observe, 1=Suggest, 2=Draft, 3=Confirm, 4=Auto)

ingestionDate.description: ISO 8601 date-time string indicating when the skill was ingested

permissions.description: List of permissions required or granted to this skill

tags.description: Categorical tags describing the skill's function or domain

entrypoint.description: Path or identifier for the skill's entry point or main function
